recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Time Travel
recommendations.overview: Follows three social outcasts -- two geeks and a cynic -- as they attempt to navigate a time-travel conundrum in the middle of a British pub.

recommendations.title: Groundhog Day
recommendations.overview: A cynical TV weatherman, along with his idealistic producer and his sardonic cameraman, is sent to report on Groundhog Day in the small town of Punxsutawney, where he finds himself repeating the same day over and over.

recommendations.title: Man with a Movie Camera
recommendations.overview: A cameraman wanders around with a camera slung over his shoulder, documenting urban life with dazzling inventiveness.

recommendations.title: Moscow Does Not Believe in Tears
recommendations.overview: Living together in a workers' dorm, Katerina and her friends are determined to make it in Moscow. But when a boorish cameraman forces himself on her, Katerina finds herself pregnant and alone as her friends move on. Twenty years later, Katerina is a

recommendations.title: Ten
recommendations.overview: A visual social examination in the form of ten conversations between a driving woman and her various pick-ups and hitchhikers.

recommendations.title: Naqoyqatsi
recommendations.overview: A visual montage portrait of our contemporary world dominated by globalized technology and violence.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Desire
recommendations.overview: In a social context deteriorated by a countrywide economic crisis, the life of several people will be turned upside down after they meet Cécile, a character who symbolizes desire.

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: Reputation Stadium Tour
recommendations.overview: Taylor Swift takes the stage in Dallas for the Reputation Stadium Tour and celebrates a monumental night of music, memories and visual magic.
